title: Specklinia geminiflora
taxonomy: Specklinia geminiflora is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae and is native to Central and South America. The genus Specklinia is further divided into several sections, with S. geminiflora classified under the section Pleurothallidinae. The exact classification of this species is not well-documented, and more research is needed to confirm its precise taxonomic status. However, it is generally classified as a terrestrial orchid due to its growth habits and habitat.
